{{Infobox location
| name = Hall of Judgment
| introduced = Dreadgod
}}

== Dreadgod ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">3</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|The [[Hall of Judgment]] is a shining golden tower on an artificial hill.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c1">''Dreadgod'', chapter 1</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|A crack echoed through the [[Hall of Judgment]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c1" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|The [[Hall of Judgment]] is a golden edifice belonging to the [[Abidan]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c20">''Dreadgod'', chapter 20</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Waybound ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The [[Hall of Judgment]] is located in [[Sanctum]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c32">''Waybound'', chapter 32</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:Dreadgod]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle locations]]
[[Category:Structures]]
